new_claims.claim_text: US naval blockade of Iran has officially begun, restricting ships entering and exiting Iranian ports.
new_claims.notes: Reported by @War_Radar2 citing Reuters, and corroborated by @Osint613's CENTCOM notice. Requires external verification to confirm 'officially begun' status.

updated_claims.notes: Reports of US naval blockade beginning and CENTCOM notices indicate increased restrictions, but 'effectively closed' for specific vessels remains to be verified.
Reports from @Polymarket and @Kalshi suggest Iran is weighing proposals or willing to continue discussions, adding nuance to this diplomatic signal.
